examples: I'll pay you back next week.
Don't try to pay me back.
He wanted to pay her back for the betrayal.
I'll pay you back for this!
He paid back all his debts.
She paid him back for his kindness.
When will you pay me back?
She paid back the loan in full.
Can you pay back the money tomorrow?
example_translate: Я верну тебе деньги на следующей неделе.
Он хотел отплатить ей за предательство.
pay back.synonyms:
Возвращать деньги (долг) - repay, return, reimburse
Отплачивать (за услугу, обиду) - retaliate, get revenge
